title: Trust Legal advises Gaudium IVF on IPO
description: Gaudium IVF & Women Health Limited has launched an initial public offering of equity shares, comprising a fresh issue and an offer for sale from Promoter shareholder, Dr. Manika Khanna.Trust Legal is advising Gaudium IVF on this IPO. The Firm's role includes advising on due diligence, restructuring, disclosure standards, and coordination with merchant bankers and advisors.The transaction is led by Sudhir Mishra (Founder & Managing Partner) and Petal Chandhok (Partner).The Firm has been a
